{{Quote|It's called the ''Bes'uliik''. The Basilisk. I always had a soft spot for the ancient battle droids. Good old ''Mando'' name and old-fashioned ''Mando'' iron in a state-of-the-art package.|Jir Yomaget, discussing the ''[[Bes'uliik]]''-class starfighter|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice">''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]''</ref>}}
'''Jir Yomaget''' was the head of [[MandalMotors/Legends|MandalMotors]] at the time of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. Yomaget came to the meeting of the clans in [[Keldabe/Legends|Keldabe]] on [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]], which many other Mandalorians also attended, where he gave half of MandalMotors profits to Mandalore to aide in the rebuilding of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. He would later give [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] the first look at the new ''[[Bes'uliik]]'' [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] after the discovery of a new vein of [[Beskar/Legends|Mandalorian iron]]. He would later be somewhat disappointed that [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] had not come to Mandalore in order to purchase a ''Bes'uliik''.
